prompt:
A moody urban fashion editorial photo of a young woman crouching in a narrow alley beside a worn concrete wall covered with black graffiti and stickers, with a metal shutter in the background also marked with graffiti. She wears a loose navy blue tracksuit with white side stripes, consisting of 2 visible outfit pieces: a zip-front track jacket and matching track pants, layered over a light gray or off-white hooded sweatshirt, and white chunky sneakers. Her hair is tied up in a messy bun, and she poses with one elbow on her knee and one hand near her face, giving a casual, introspective street-style look. The face area is obscured by a rectangular blur block. The composition is vertical, full-body to three-quarter body, slightly low angle, with soft natural overcast lighting, muted cinematic colors, shallow depth of field, realistic photography, high detail in fabric folds, pavement texture, and wall grime. Add 2 distinct text overlays integrated into the image: on the left upper side, handwritten white Japanese brush-style text reading きゅっくらい、ちゃんと わたしを ほめてあげよ。; on the lower left, small elegant serif editorial text in white arranged in stacked lines reading exactly 5 lines: Street is
My Everyday.
2024
Autumn / Winter
Look Book, plus a small sixth credit line below reading by mellovneon. Emphasize a Japanese streetwear lookbook aesthetic, candid yet styled, slightly gritty, premium fashion campaign feel.
